close_reason: Implemented CI/CD headless E2E test (02-ci-headless.sh). Test validates nix develop --command workflow without direnv.
description:
Test scenario: Headless CI environment

1. Create project with committed deps files
2. In CI container (no direnv, no interactive shell):
   - 'nix develop --command tk build //...'
   - 'nix develop --command tk test //...'
3. Verify builds succeed without .envrc execution
4. Verify no network calls during build (all deps pre-fetched)

Validates: CI compatibility, hermetic builds, no direnv dependency in CI
title: E2E: CI/CD without interactive shell
